summary: Iter 163 – 'Schedule unpublish' feature for marketing banners. Full backend + frontend verification passed. Pytest (6/6 new + 38/38+1 skipped regression) + live API tests (6/6) + Playwright UI E2E all green.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/marketing_studio.py line 561 has a double-assignment typo: `update['scheduled_start'] = update['scheduled_start'] = now_iso`. Harmless (self-assign) but should be cleaned up.

Seeded marketing_assets must contain `image_url` for publish to succeed; endpoint throws KeyError otherwise (500). Consider `.get('image_url','')` or Pydantic-level validation for older gallery rows that might miss the field.
seed_data_creation: Seeded a synthetic marketing_assets doc id='test-iter163-ui-6e7063' (no real fal.ai call) for UI E2E. Cleaned up post-run; promo_banner disabled to restore state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live API test file at /app/backend/tests/test_schedule_live_iter163.py seeds + cleans its own assets via Mongo; reuses dotenv to pick up DB_NAME=tile_station. Admin auth endpoint is POST /api/auth/login returning {token, user}. website_settings filter is {key: 'promo_banner'}. Next iter should probably keep all 6 live tests in regression.

detailed_verification.live_api_tests: 6/6 passed – publish persists schedule_enabled/scheduled_end/asset_id + marketing_asset.auto_unpublish_at; _run_one_pass flipped enabled=false + cleared published_to; public /api/website/promo-banner reflected enabled:false; re-publish w/o schedule cleared scheduled_end + asset.auto_unpublish_at
detailed_verification.ui_datetime_input: marketing-asset-auto-end-{id} visible; 5 chips all present with correct testids
detailed_verification.ui_amber_badge: marketing-asset-auto-end-badge-{id} visible WITH green PUBLISHED → PROMO BANNER label
detailed_verification.ui_unpublish: Both amber badge and green PROMO BANNER label disappeared after unpublish
detailed_verification.ui_regression_no_schedule: POST body auto_unpublish_at:null; no 'auto-removes' text; no amber badge
